name: PM Kisan
short_description: Income support of ₹6,000 per year to all farmer families in three equal installments.
benefits: ₹6,000 annual income support in 3 installments of ₹2,000
Direct benefit transfer to bank accounts
application_process: Register at pmkisan.gov.in or visit nearest agriculture office. Verification by state government followed by DBT.

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
short_description: Comprehensive crop insurance scheme providing financial support on crop failure due to natural calamities.
benefits: Low premium rates: 2% Kharif, 1.5% Rabi, 5% commercial crops
Covers yield losses and post-harvest losses
Technology-based claim assessment using remote sensing
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas
application_process: Enroll through banks, CSCs, or insurance companies within cutoff dates. Premium deducted or paid directly.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
short_description: Provides farmers timely access to credit for crop cultivation and allied activities at subsidized interest rates.
benefits: Credit limit based on land holding and crop pattern
Interest subvention of 2% on prompt repayment
Covers crop production, maintenance, and marketing
eligibility: All farmers including tenant farmers and oral lessees
Self Help Groups and Joint Liability Groups
Must have land records or tenancy proof
application_process: Apply at nearest bank branch or through online portal. Bank assesses credit limit and issues KCC.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
short_description: Provides soil health cards to farmers with crop-wise nutrient recommendations for balanced fertilizer use.
benefits: Reduces input costs and improves soil health
eligibility: Priority to small and marginal farmers
application_process: Contact district agriculture officer or soil testing lab. Soil sample collected and analyzed; card issued within 15 days.

name: eNAM (National Agriculture Market)
short_description: Online trading platform connecting APMC mandis for transparent and competitive price discovery.
eligibility: Commodity must be listed on platform
application_process: Register at enam.gov.in with Aadhaar and bank details. Visit nearest eNAM-enabled mandi for trading.

name: PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana
short_description: Ensures access to irrigation for every farm through convergence of irrigation schemes and water use efficiency.
eligibility: Priority to small and marginal farmers
application_process: Apply through state agriculture/horticulture department or online portal. Site inspection followed by subsidy release.
